allow: Bash(powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $content = Get-Content ''C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/reciters_ar.json'' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $data = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $reciters = $data.reciters; foreach \($r in $reciters\) { Write-Host \($r.id.ToString\(\).PadLeft\(6\)\) $r.name }")

Bash(powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $content = Get-Content ''C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/reciters_ar.json'' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $data = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $reciters = $data.reciters; $keywords = @\(''شريف'',''مصطفى'',''عبيدة'',''معافق'',''الحميداني'',''حميداني''\); foreach \($r in $reciters\) { foreach \($kw in $keywords\) { if \($r.name -match $kw\) { Write-Host ''=== ID:'' $r.id ''Name:'' $r.name; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; break } } }")

Bash(powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $content = Get-Content ''C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/reciters_fr.json'' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $data = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $reciters = $data.reciters; $keywords = @\(''matrood'',''matrod'',''sherif'',''mostafa'',''obaida'',''muafaq'',''hamidani'',''hamdani'',''mostafa'',''مطرود'',''الحميداني'',''معافق'',''شريف'',''عبيدة''\); foreach \($r in $reciters\) { $name = $r.name; foreach \($kw in $keywords\) { if \($name -match $kw\) { Write-Host ''=== ID:'' $r.id ''Name:'' $r.name; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; break } } }")

Bash(powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $content = Get-Content ''C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/reciters_fr.json'' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $data = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; $reciters = $data.reciters; Write-Host ''Total:'' $reciters.Count; foreach \($r in $reciters\) { Write-Host $r.id $r.name }")

Bash(powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''https://www.mp3quran.net/api/v3/reciters?language=en'' -UseBasicParsing; $data = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $reciters = $data.reciters; Write-Host ''Total EN:'' $reciters.Count; $keywords = @\(''matrood'',''matrod'',''sherif'',''mostafa'',''obaida'',''muafaq'',''hamidani'',''hamdani''\); foreach \($r in $reciters\) { $name = $r.name.ToLower\(\); foreach \($kw in $keywords\) { if \($name -match $kw\) { Write-Host ''=== ID:'' $r.id ''Name:'' $r.name; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; break } } }")
